channel.title: Nativize Blog
channel.description: Guides for turning Lovable, Vite, React, and GitHub web apps into native apps with Nativize.

item.title: How to ship a Lovable app to the App Store and Play Store (2026)
item.description: A step-by-step guide to turning a Lovable app into a native iOS and Android app and publishing it with Nativize, Capacitor, and GitHub Actions.
